goals.title: PER-52 P6-T01 voice state not persisted as joined. Acceptance: app re...
goals.objective: PER-52 P6-T01 voice state not persisted as joined. Acceptance: app restart/load must derive joined state only from an active backend media session; stale persisted voice_session or voice_channel active_context must not restore as joined. Scope: backend/Tauri state persistence and focused restart regression evidence; do not add device selection, media signaling bridge, group fanout, overlay, or UX polish.
goals.evidence: Local implementation and verification passed: added stale_persisted_joined_voice_session_is_cleared_on_restart in apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs plus .omx/plans/P6-T01-voice-state-not-persisted-joined-2026-06-20.md. Post-cleanup checks passed: targeted desktop backend restart test, cargo fmt --check, git diff --check. AI slop cleanup found no new masking fallback in the added test. Blocker: this session exposes no native task tool or .codex/agents for independent code-reviewer and architect lanes; tool discovery exposed GitHub review tools only. Per Ultragoal final gate, independent review unavailable blocks marking aggregate goal complete.
